misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: front matter with magazine cover/title page, table of contents listing all articles for April 1921, advertisers' directory, General Board member listings, various advertisements for local Salt Lake City businesses (garments, bread, phonographs, furniture, etc.), subscription information, and back matter with more advertisements and magazine ordering information. No standalone articles, poems, editorials or stories are present - only organizational and commercial content appropriate for the Misc category.
